_howto: Add an item to 'items' each time you post. Newest is shown first automatically (by 'date'). To auto-pull from LinkedIn, create a LinkedIn->RSS feed with a third-party service and paste its URL into 'feedUrl' (leave empty to stay manual). Items are sorted by 'date' (use YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM).
